fcSpend: At this pace, you'll spend %s by month end.
fcOver: At this rate your budget runs out %d days early.
fcOk: At the current pace you'll stay within budget.
fcNoData: Not enough data for a forecast yet.
fcNoBudget: Set a budget limit for a sharper forecast.
scFund: Keep it up and you'll build an emergency fund in %d months.
scNeg: Spending exceeded income by %s — savings are negative.
scNoIncome: Add income to analyze your savings.
riskCatUp: %s spending has risen %d months in a row.
riskGoalIdle: No funds added to goals for %d days.
riskOverBudget: You've gone over budget this month.
riskNone: No serious risks right now — well done!
qiTransport: Trimming transport could save ~%s per month.
qiDineOut: Dining out is up — cook at home and save %s.
qiOnPace: Your budget is on track — keep it up.
qiTopCat: Biggest expense: %s. Easiest place to cut.
wedNeed: Set aside %s more per month to stay on the wedding plan.
wedReady: Wedding savings are on plan — great!
famProgress: %d%% of family goals are on track.
